'''Langro Dis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] who operated as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Langro was distinguished from his kind by his near-[[Albino/Legends|albino]] appearance; having pale, white skin and flame-red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].

==Biography==
[[File:Langro_Dis_SWG5.png|thumb|left|150px|Langro Dis]]
Langro Dis hoped to make a name for himself as a hunter when he accepted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Krova (Hutt)|Krova]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Dis tracked the Hutt to the [[Pluthan system/Legends|Pluthan system]], and successfully captured her. However, it was believed that Krova allowed herself to be captured, in order to "clear her name". Dis delivered her to [[Hundria Kast]], though Krova apparently made a deal that would ensure her freedom. Unfortunately, a group of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] led by [[Noth]] attacked the Hutt, seeking a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] Krova had previously swallowed for safe-keeping. Langro was caught up in the fighting, and barely escaped with his life.<ref name="THH" />

Langro Dis [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] named ''[[Glorious Spectrum]]''.<ref name="THH" />
